immutable_core.semantic_definition: One time-stamped row per retained source-recorded treatment/device/IO amount event under the approved source-context rule.
immutable_core.same_name_cross_database_rule: Same-name assets must preserve source-faithful event-level amount semantics, source context, unit meaning, and downstream aggregation boundary.

event_stream_contract.event_value_meaning: source-recorded amount value after approved unit normalization
event_stream_contract.unit_rule: retain raw unit and standardize only when deterministic
event_stream_contract.context_role_rule: retain source labels and context classes needed to interpret the amount
event_stream_contract.parent_link_rule: optional mapping-specific parent treatment/support episode link
event_stream_contract.downstream_aggregation_rule: summaries, smoothing, counter differencing, or episode redistribution are separate governed transformations
event_stream_contract.no_row_interpretation: no retained event under the approved source rule
